param.name: appliance_hostname
param.doc: Host name of the appliance.

method.name: POST
method.id: Create login credentials for a container registry.
method.doc: Create a credential for a container registry. For registries requiring authentication, provide username and password. For registries with self-signed or non-standard CA certificates, provide the CA certificate bundle to establish trust. The CA certificate can be provided with or without authentication credentials. Optional proxy configuration can also be specified.
Warning: This API does not function without installing the Appliance Container Extension from the IBM Security App Exchange.

param.name: Authorization
param.doc: Basic Authentication header

param.name: Accept:application/json
param.doc: Required for requests to the service

param.name: host
param.doc: The address or domain name of the registry to authenticate to.

param.name: user
param.doc: The user to authenticate as. If secret is set then this field is required.

param.name: secret
param.doc: The secret to authenticate with. If user is set then this field is required.

param.name: proxy_host
param.doc: An optional proxy to set when pulling images from this container registry. Additional properties can be set for this proxy, if they are not provided and do not have a default value, then they are ignored.

param.name: proxy_port
param.doc: The port for the proxy. The default is 3128. If proxy_host is not set then this field will be ignored.

param.name: proxy_user
param.doc: The user to authenticate to the proxy with. Must be provided if proxy_pass is set. If proxy_host or proxy_pass is not set then this field will be ignored.

param.name: proxy_pass
param.doc: The password to authenticate to the proxy with. Must be provided if proxy_user is set. If proxy_host or proxy_user is not set then this field will be ignored.

param.name: proxy_schema
param.doc: The TCP schema to use. The default is "http". If proxy_host is not set then this field will be ignored.

param.name: ca
param.doc: An optional CA Certificat bundle (PEM encoded) to verify connections to the container registry. This may be required if your registry uses a self-signed certificate.

param.name: Content-Type:application/json
param.doc: Response is in JSON formatting

param.name: host
param.doc: The address or domain name of the registry to authenticate to.

param.name: user
param.doc: The user to authenticate as.

param.name: id
param.doc: Appliance generated unique identifier for this credential.

response.doc: There is a problem with the request. The JSON message describes the problem.

param.name: Content-Type:application/json
param.doc: Response is in JSON formatting

param.name: message
param.doc: The error message.

response.doc: File not Found, The requested service does not exist. The JSON message indicates which resource.

param.name: Content-Type:application/json
param.doc: Response is in JSON formatting

param.name: message
param.doc: The error message.

response.doc: An internal error occurred. The JSON message indicates the problem.

param.name: Content-Type:application/json
param.doc: Response is in JSON formatting

param.name: message
param.doc: The error message.
